action.text: text[<num1>:<num2>] # Get characters from position num1 to num2 (num2 not included)

text[:<num>] # Get characters from the start to pos num (not included)
text[<num>:] # Get characters from the pos num to the end

text.upper() # Set the string as upper case
text.lower() # Set the string as lower case

text = ' Hello, World '
print(text.strip()) # Remove any whitespaces from the beginning or the end
text.replace(<str1>, <str2>) # Replace the characters str1 with str2
text.split(<str>) # Split the string with the param and return substrings as a list

text1 = 'Hello'
text2 = 'World'
text1 + text2 # Merge the two texts
